steps.title: Find the boundary line equation
steps.content: Reading the graph, the boundary passes through $(0,6)$ and $(1.5,0)$. The slope is $\frac{0-6}{1.5-0}=-4$, giving $y=-4x+6$.

steps.title: Pick the inequality direction from the shading
steps.content: The shaded region lies above the boundary. Test $(0,8)$: $8>-4(0)+6=6$ ✓, so the inequality is $$y>-4x+6.$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
